title: Cultural-morphology and molecular analysis of Botryodiplodia theobromae, a pathogen of coconut fruit
author: Ekhorutomwen, Osayomore Endurance
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This study provides information on the identification of the pathogen causing fruit rot and premature nut fall diseases of coconut.
steps_raw: This study provides information on the identification of the pathogen causing fruit rot and premature nut fall diseases of coconut.
